_description: Ground-truth labels for MCPRadar benchmark. expected_rules lists rule IDs that SHOULD fire. expected_findings_min/max define acceptable finding count ranges.

demo/malicious_server.py.notes: Intentional test corpus. Should trigger all 10 static rules. R110 (fingerprint) and R111 (transport) are integration-level rules not tested here.

@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem.notes: Official reference server. Should be clean. Any findings are potential FPs worth investigating.

@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything.notes: Official reference server. Should be clean.

@modelcontextprotocol/server-memory.notes: Official reference server. Should be clean.
